creator: kuriyama@FreeBSD.org
text:
gdb for 68hc11 is proceeded to gdb-5.x line.
Distribution site in this PR seems to be missing, but there are
patches for gdb-5.x in the site of devel/m6811-binutils.

I think we should close this PR (for gdb-4.x).
New ports PR submiission for gdb-5.x will be appreciated.
